---
title: "report"
format: html
---

# Intro

## Visuals Covered

[ ] Total participants over time (with gender comparisons) *displayed as a stacked bar chart*

[ ] Official finish times for overall winners over time *displayed as a line chart*

[ ] Between-Gender comparisons of official finish times per age group *displayed as a violin plot*

## Data

All data displayed represented is taken form the publicly available repository ["Boston Marathon Data"](https://github.com/adrian3/Boston-Marathon-Data-Project/tree/master)


```{r}
library(ggforce)
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
base_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/adrian3/Boston-Marathon-Data-Project/refs/heads/master/"

# years <- 1897:2019
years <- c(1897:1900, 2001)
file_urls <- paste0(base_url, "results", years, ".csv")

combined_data <- file_urls %>%
  set_names(years) %>% 
  map_dfr(read_csv, .id = "Year")

head(combined_data)
```

# Visuals

## Total participants over time (with gender comparisons)

```{r}
total_per_year <- combined_data |> 
  count(Year, gender) |>
  group_by(Year)

historical_performance <- total_per_year |>
  ggplot(aes(x=Year, y=n, fill=gender)) +
  geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity")
```

## Official finish times for overall winners over time

```{r}
overall_winners <- combined_data |>
  filter(gender_result==1)

overall_bests <- overall_winners |>
  ggplot(aes(x=Year, y=official_time, color=gender)) + 
  geom_point()
```

## Between-Gender comparisons of official finish times per age group

```{r}
plot_violin_jitter <- function(dataset, x, y) {
  dataset |>
  ggplot(aes(x={{x}}, y={{y}})) + 
  geom_violin() +
  geom_jitter()
}

women_unallowed <-
  combined_data |>
  filter(Year < 1972)

women_allowed <-
  combined_data |>
  filter(Year >= 1972)
  
  
gender_densities <- plot_violin_jitter(women_unallowed, gender, official_time) + 
  plot_violin_jitter(women_allowed, gender, official_time)
```


```{r}
gender_densities / historical_performance / overall_bests
```
